title: Streamline pckg docs UI component imports

source.subject: refactor(docs): streamline component imports and enhance documentation UI

body:
pckg documentation UI streamlines Fluent component imports and layout for package docs browser parity with platform-spec chrome.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`c0bad88`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_pckg/commit/c0bad88)
- **Subject:** refactor(docs): streamline component imports and enhance documentation UI
- **Completed:** 2026-05-24

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `pckg-registry`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-pckg-tool-registry`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **Tool packageKind and registry integration** (`v03-pckg-tool-registry`).
